PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Marissa C. Smith appearing via zoom for Petitioner Kim Chi Tran.

The Court noted that no appearance was made by Edward Poole. Mrs. Smith stated that this is a situation where the first listed executor is deceased, that the second listed executor declined to serve, that her client notified the Public administrator and that her client is now asking to be appointed. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated October 07, 2013 is admitted to probate. Kim Chi Tran is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed and with full authority. Bond is set at $554,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 30, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.
